quote: In a world of overwhelming automation, they are the light!
Our Childhood's End. Open Source fights back!

When it comes to matters of the star known as Siosm, the empires of the cosmos look to inspiration. It is said that even John Bazzite pays tribute to the star of the atomic universe. The number of stars in the sky, uncountable.
context: The Cosmos, Volume 3 (Blue Universal Approved Edition)

quote: Honestly I just work on Fedora to toss RPMs right at Jorge's smug cloud native face.

quote: And the people, enslaved by the Toilmaster under the boot of John Bazzite, suffered.
